jobs.title: E-Commerce Performance and SEO Manager
jobs.description:
Reporting directly to the Chief Digital Officer, the E-Commerce Performance Marketing & SEO Manager, is responsible for creating and implementing online marketing strategies to drive traffic to the site, that bring sales and revenue for Guess e-commerce website. He/she will be responsible for driving qualified traffic, customer acquisition, revenue growth, and online visibility through paid and organic digital channels.

Another task will be the supervision of the entire Performance Marketing team and all the activities performed by it.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

SEO Responsibilities

Together with the SEO lead on his/her team and the support of an external agency, we aim to:

## Requirements
- At least 8 years’ experience in web-marketing and CRO environment
- At least 8 years’ experience in SEO and analytics Tools as Google Analytics, Google Trends, SEM Rush, Adobe Omniture and Google Search Console tool
- Excellent knowledge of Office package, especially Excel
- HTML good knowledge
- Proficiency knowledge of English language (both written and spoken). Any additional language is a plus
- Must possess strong leadership skills and be precise, well organized, self-motivated, focused on meeting deadlines and able to multitask within a fast-paced environment
- Attention to detail and follow-up
- Excellent analytical and time management skills. Preference to work with number
- Excellent execution, high respect of deadlines and good level of proactivity
- Sense of ownership and pride in the performance and its impact on company’s success
- Capability of adapt to changes and work under pressure
- Critical thinker and problem-solving skills
- Capability to work under strict, short deadlines
- Positive attitude, team player, ability to work independently and to coordinate projects and people.
- Lead, mentor and support the other team members.
- Demonstrates strong decision-making ability
- Ability to drive & apply continuous improvement in process and tools
- Ability to establish and maintain harmonious working relationships with co-workers, staff and external contacts, and to work effectively in a professional team environment
- Excellent interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to interact with a diverse group at all level
- Interested to work in an international environment and to network with worldwide business units

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility;
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

titleByLocale.it: E-Commerce Web Marketing, CRO e SEO Manager
titleByLocale.de: E-Commerce Web Marketing, CRO und SEO Manager
titleByLocale.fr: E-Commerce Web Marketing, CRO et SEO Manager

descriptionByLocale.it:
Segnalandosi direttamente al Chief Digital Officer, l'E-Commerce Web Marketing, CRO & SEO Manager, è responsabile per la creazione e l'attuazione di strategie di marketing online per aumentare le vendite e i ricavi per il sito web di e-commerce Guess. Egli massimizzerà le opportunità tecniche e creative offerte dalla vastità del Web-based statico e social marketing al fine di attirare i clienti al marchio. Il ruolo si occuperà di acquisto dei media, social networking e ottimizzazione dei motori di ricerca per mantenere una base client e cercare nuovi clienti. Inoltre, il ruolo deve guidare verso l'esterno dell'ambiguità e mettere in discussione lo status quo per ottenere più fuori dalle campagne di marketing e contenuti del sito web; sa come creare senso di urgenza per i clienti. Un altro compito sarà la supervisione dell'intero team di Web Marketing e di tutte le attività svolte da esso. ##
• Requisiti - Almeno 8 anni di esperienza nel web-marketing e nell'ambiente CRO; - almeno 8 anni di esperienza in SEO e strumenti di analisi come Google Analytics, Google Trends, SEM Rush, Adobe Omniture e Google Search Console strumento - Conoscenza di competenza della lingua inglese (sia scritta che parlata). Qualsiasi lingua aggiuntiva è un plus - deve possedere forti capacità di leadership ed essere preciso, ben organizzato, auto-motivato, incentrato sulle scadenze di incontro e in grado di multitask all'interno di un ambiente veloce-paced - attenzione ai dettagli e follow-up; - eccellenti capacità di analisi e gestione del tempo. Preferenza di lavorare con numero - Esecuzione eccellente, alto rispetto delle scadenze e buon livello di proattività - Senso di proprietà e orgoglio nelle prestazioni e il suo impatto sul successo dell'azienda - Capacità di adattarsi ai cambiamenti e al lavoro sotto pressione - Pensatore critico e capacità di problem solving - Capacità di lavorare sotto scadenze rigorose e brevi - atteggiamento positivo, giocatore di squadra, capacità di lavorare indipendentemente e di coordinare progetti e persone. - Guida, mentore e sostenere gli altri membri del team. - Dimostra una forte capacità decisionale - Capacità di guidare e applicare il miglioramento continuo dei processi e degli strumenti - Capacità di stabilire e mantenere relazioni di lavoro armoniose con i colleghi, il personale e i contatti esterni, e di lavorare efficacemente in un ambiente di team professionale - Eccellente capacità interpersonali e di comunicazione con la capacità di interagire con un gruppo diverso a tutti i livelli - Interessato a lavorare in un ambiente internazionale e di rete con le unità aziendali mondiali - Piattaforma e percorsi di formazione e sviluppo - Sconto sui nostri prodotti sia online che nei negozi
descriptionByLocale.en:
Reporting directly to the Chief Digital Officer, the E-Commerce Web Marketing, CRO & SEO Manager, is responsible for creating and implementing online marketing strategies to increase sales and revenue for Guess e-commerce website. He/she will maximize the technical and creative opportunities afforded by the breadth of Web-based static and social marketing in order to attract customers to the brand. The role will deal with media buying, social networking and search engine optimization to maintain a client base and seek new clients. Moreover, the role has to drive direction out of ambiguity and question the status quo to get more out of marketing campaigns and website contents; he/she knows how to create sense of urgency for customers. Another task will be the supervision of the entire Web Marketing team and all the activities performed by it. ##
• Requirements - At least 8 years experience in web-marketing and CRO environment; - At least 8 years experience in SEO and analytics Tools as Google Analytics, Google Trends, SEM Rush, Adobe Omniture and Google Search Console tool - Proficiency knowledge of English language (both written and spoken). Any additional language is a plus - Must possess strong leadership skills and be precise, well organized, self-motivated, focused on meeting deadlines and able to multitask within a fast-paced environment - Attention to detail and follow-up; - Excellent analytical and time management skills. Preference to work with number - Excellent execution, high respect of deadlines and good level of proactivity - Sense of ownership and pride in the performance and its impact on company’s success - Capability of adapt to changes and work under pressure - Critical thinker and problem-solving skills - Capability to work under strict, short deadlines - Positive attitude, team player, ability to work independently and to coordinate projects and people. - Lead, mentor and support the other team members. - Demonstrates strong decision-making ability - Ability to drive & apply continuous improvement in process and tools - Ability to establish and maintain harmonious working relationships with co-workers, staff and external contacts, and to work effectively in a professional team environment - Excellent interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to interact with a diverse group at all level - Interested to work in an international environment and to network with worldwide business units ## Benefits - An International, fresh and dynamic working environment - Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility; - Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community - Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities! - Training & Development platform and paths - Discount on our products both online and in stores
descriptionByLocale.de:
Die Direktmeldung an den Chief Digital Officer, den E-Commerce Web Marketing, den CRO & SEO Manager, ist für die Erstellung und Umsetzung von Online-Marketing-Strategien verantwortlich, um Umsatz und Umsatz für die Guess E-Commerce-Website zu erhöhen. Er/sie wird die technischen und kreativen Möglichkeiten maximieren, die sich durch die Breite des webbasierten statischen und sozialen Marketings ergeben, um Kunden an die Marke zu gewinnen. Die Rolle wird sich mit Medienkauf, Social Networking und Suchmaschinenoptimierung beschäftigen, um eine Kundenbasis zu erhalten und neue Kunden zu suchen. Darüber hinaus muss die Rolle die Richtung aus Mehrdeutigkeit treiben und den Status quo in Frage stellen, um mehr aus Marketingkampagnen und Webseiteninhalten herauszuholen; er/sie weiß, wie man ein Gefühl der Dringlichkeit für die Kunden schafft. Eine weitere Aufgabe wird die Überwachung des gesamten Web Marketing-Teams und aller von ihm durchgeführten Aktivitäten sein.
• Anforderungen - Mindestens 8 Jahre Erfahrung in Webmarketing und CRO-Umgebung; - mindestens 8 Jahre Erfahrung in SEO und Analytik Tools wie Google Analytics, Google Trends, SEM Rush, Adobe Omniture und Google Search Console Tool - Kenntnisse der englischen Sprache (beide geschrieben und gesprochen). Jede zusätzliche Sprache ist ein Plus - Müssen starke Führungsfähigkeiten besitzen und präzise, gut organisiert, selbst motiviert, konzentriert auf Termine und in der Lage, innerhalb einer schnelllebigen Umgebung zu multiplizieren - Aufmerksamkeit zum Detail und Follow-up; - Ausgezeichnete analytische und Zeitmanagementfähigkeiten. Vorliebe bei der Arbeit mit der Nummer - Ausgezeichnete Ausführung, hohe Einhaltung von Fristen und gutes Niveau der Proaktivität - Sinn des Eigentums und Stolz auf die Leistung und seine Auswirkungen auf den Erfolg des Unternehmens - Fähigkeit zur Anpassung an Veränderungen und Arbeit unter Druck - Kritische Denker und Problemlösung Fähigkeiten - Fähigkeit zur Arbeit unter strengen, kurzen Fristen - Positive Einstellung, Teamplayer, Fähigkeit, unabhängig zu arbeiten und Projekte und Menschen zu koordinieren. - Führen, Mentor und unterstützen die anderen Teammitglieder. - Demonstriert starke Entscheidungsfähigkeit - Fähigkeit, kontinuierliche Verbesserung in Prozess und Werkzeugen voranzutreiben und anzuwenden - Fähigkeit, harmonische Arbeitsbeziehungen mit Mitarbeitern, Mitarbeitern und externen Kontakten zu etablieren und effektiv in einem professionellen Team-Umfeld zu arbeiten - Ausgezeichnete zwischenmenschliche und kommunikative Fähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, mit einer vielfältigen Gruppe auf allen Ebenen zu interagieren - Interesse an der Arbeit in einem internationalen Umfeld und Netzwerk mit weltweiten Geschäftsbereichen - Trainings- und Entwicklungsplattform und -wege - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte sowohl online als auch in den Läden
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Relevant directement du Directeur du Digital, le Web Marketing E-Commerce, CRO & SEO Manager, est responsable de la création et de la mise en œuvre de stratégies de marketing en ligne pour augmenter les ventes et les revenus du site Web de Guess e-commerce. Il/elle maximisera les possibilités techniques et créatives offertes par l'étendue du marketing statique et social sur le Web afin d'attirer les clients vers la marque. Le rôle portera sur l'achat de médias, le réseautage social et l'optimisation des moteurs de recherche pour maintenir une base de clients et rechercher de nouveaux clients. De plus, le rôle doit sortir l'orientation de l'ambiguïté et remettre en question le statu quo pour sortir davantage des campagnes de marketing et des contenus du site Web; il/elle sait comment créer un sentiment d'urgence pour les clients. Une autre tâche consistera à superviser toute l'équipe de marketing Web et toutes les activités qu'elle mène. ##
• Exigences - Au moins 8 ans d'expérience en marketing web et environnement CRO; - Au moins 8 ans d'expérience dans le référencement et les outils d'analyse comme Google Analytics, Google Trends, SEM Rush, Adobe Omniture et Google Search Console tool - Connaissance de la langue anglaise (écrite et parlée). Toute autre langue est un plus - Doit posséder de solides compétences en leadership et être précise, bien organisée, automotivée, axée sur le respect des délais et capable de multitâche dans un environnement à rythme rapide - Attention aux détails et suivi; - Excellentes compétences en analyse et gestion du temps. Préférence au travail avec le nombre - Excellente exécution, haut respect des délais et bon niveau de proactivité - Sens de la propriété et de la fierté dans la performance et son impact sur la réussite de l'entreprise - Capacité d'adaptation aux changements et au travail sous pression - Critical thinker and problem-solving skills - Capacité de travailler dans des délais stricts et courts - attitude positive, joueur d'équipe, capacité de travailler indépendamment et de coordonner les projets et les personnes. - Diriger, encadrer et soutenir les autres membres de l'équipe. - Démontre une forte capacité de prise de décision - Capacité de conduire et d'appliquer une amélioration continue des processus et des outils - Capacité d'établir et de maintenir des relations de travail harmonieuses avec les collègues, le personnel et les contacts externes, et de travailler efficacement dans un environnement d'équipe professionnelle - Excellentes compétences en relations interpersonnelles et en communication avec un groupe diversifié à tous les niveaux - Intéressé à travailler dans un environnement international et à travailler en réseau avec des unités commerciales mondiales ## Avantages - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamiques - Équilibre entre le travail et la vie personnelle : travail intelligent (modèle de travail hybride) et flexibilité du temps; - Programmes de santé physique et mentale, projets durables et atelier promus par Guess Community - Arts, sports et événements sociaux à l'extérieur du bureau, grâce à nos activités Guess Fun! - Plateforme et chemins de formation et de développement - Réduction sur nos produits en ligne et en magasin

jobs.title: Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon & North America)
jobs.description:
The Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon and North America) drives profitable brand growth on Amazon as both Vendor (1P) and Marketplace Seller (3P), while shaping marketplace strategy in North America. This role manages commercial performance, supports Amazon P&L, and ensures operational excellence, brand consistency, and sustained growth through coordination with Amazon, Marketplace NA, partners, and internal teams.

P&L and Business Management

Amazon Vendor & Seller Operations Management

Merchandising and Marketing Management

Reporting and Analytics

Additional Responsibilities Carry out additional tasks and projects as assigned in line with business needs.

## Requirements
- Relevant experience of more than 7/8 years in the field
- Previous experience in ecommerce roles with direct involvement in Amazon marketplace management (Vendor Central and/or Seller Central)
- Strong understanding of Amazon operations, merchandising and performance drivers
- Solid analytical skills with ability to interpret data and KPIs
- Expertise working with Excel for Data Analysis
- Strong commercial mindset with negotiation and stakeholder management skills
- Experience working with external agencies and cross-functional teams
- Good organizational and project management skills
- Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
- Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
- Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus

## Benefits
- Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile Key Account e Marketplace (Amazon e Nord America)
titleByLocale.en: Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon & North America)
titleByLocale.fr: Responsable Comptes Clés et Marketplace (Amazon et Amérique du Nord)

descriptionByLocale.it:
Il Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon e Nord America) guida la crescita redditizia del marchio su Amazon sia come venditore (1P) che come venditore del marketplace (3P), mentre definisce la strategia del mercato in Nord America. Questo ruolo gestisce le prestazioni commerciali, supporta il P&L di Amazon e garantisce l'eccellenza operativa, la coerenza del marchio e una crescita sostenuta attraverso il coordinamento con Amazon, Marketplace NA, partner e team interni. Gestione profitti e perdite e gestione aziendale Gestione delle operazioni dei venditori e dei venditori Amazon Gestione del merchandising e del marketing Reporting e analisi Responsabilità aggiuntive Svolgere attività e progetti aggiuntivi assegnati in linea con le esigenze aziendali. ##
• Requisiti - Esperienza rilevante di oltre 7/8 anni nel settore - Precedente esperienza in ruoli di e-commerce con coinvolgimento diretto nella gestione del marketplace Amazon (Vendor Central e/o Seller Central) - Forte conoscenza delle operazioni di Amazon, del merchandising e dei fattori di performance - Solide capacità analitiche con capacità di interpretare dati e KPI - Competenza nell'uso di Excel per l'analisi dei dati - Forte mentalità commerciale con capacità di negoziazione e gestione delle parti interessate - Esperienza di lavoro con agenzie esterne e team interfunzionali - Buone capacità organizzative e di gestione dei progetti - Capacità di gestire più priorità in un ambiente frenetico - Forti capacità di comunicazione e gestione delle parti interessate - Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese; lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio ## Vantaggi - Equilibrio tra lavoro e vita personale: Smart Working (modello di lavoro ibrido) e flessibilità oraria - Un ambiente di lavoro internazionale, fresco e dinamico - Programmi di salute fisica e mentale, progetti sostenibili e workshop promossi dalla Guess Community - Arti, sport ed eventi sociali fuori dall'ufficio, grazie alle nostre attività Guess Fun! - Piattaforma e percorsi di Formazione e Sviluppo - Sconti sui nostri prodotti sia online che nei negozi
descriptionByLocale.en:
The Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon and North America) drives profitable brand growth on Amazon as both Vendor (1P) and Marketplace Seller (3P), while shaping marketplace strategy in North America. This role manages commercial performance, supports Amazon P&L, and ensures operational excellence, brand consistency, and sustained growth through coordination with Amazon, Marketplace NA, partners, and internal teams. P&L and Business Management Amazon Vendor & Seller Operations Management Merchandising and Marketing Management Reporting and Analytics Additional
• Responsibilities Carry out additional tasks and projects as assigned in line with business needs. ##
• Requirements - Relevant experience of more than 7/8 years in the field - Previous experience in ecommerce roles with direct involvement in Amazon marketplace management (Vendor Central and/or Seller Central) - Strong understanding of Amazon operations, merchandising and performance drivers - Solid analytical skills with ability to interpret data and KPIs - Expertise working with Excel for Data Analysis - Strong commercial mindset with negotiation and stakeholder management skills - Experience working with external agencies and cross-functional teams - Good organizational and project management skills - Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment - Strong communication and stakeholder management skills - Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus ## Benefits - Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility - An International, fresh and dynamic working environment - Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community - Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities! - Training & Development platform and paths - Discount on our products both online and in stores
descriptionByLocale.de:
Der Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon und Nordamerika) treibt als Vendor (1P) und Marketplace Seller (3P) das profitable Markenwachstum auf Amazon voran und gestaltet gleichzeitig die Marktplatzstrategie in Nordamerika. Diese Rolle verwaltet die kommerzielle Leistung, unterstützt die Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung von Amazon und sorgt durch Koordination mit Amazon, Marketplace NA, Partnern und internen Teams für operative Exzellenz, Markenkonsistenz und nachhaltiges Wachstum. Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung und Geschäftsmanagement Amazon Vendor & Seller Operations Management Merchandising- und Marketingmanagement Reporting und Analysen Zusätzliche Verantwortlichkeiten Führen Sie zusätzliche
• Aufgaben und Projekte aus, die entsprechend den Geschäftsanforderungen zugewiesen werden. ##
• Anforderungen – Einschlägige Erfahrung von mehr als 7/8 Jahren in diesem Bereich – Frühere Erfahrung in E-Commerce-Positionen mit direkter Beteiligung an der Verwaltung des Amazon-Marktplatzes (Vendor Central und/oder Seller Central) – Ausgeprägtes Verständnis der Amazon-Abläufe, des Merchandising und der Leistungstreiber – Solide analytische Fähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, Daten und KPIs zu interpretieren – Fachkenntnisse im Umgang mit Excel für die Datenanalyse – Ausgeprägte kaufmännische Denkweise mit Verhandlungs- und Stakeholder-Management-Fähigkeiten – Erfahrung in der Arbeit mit externen Agenturen und funktionsübergreifenden Teams – Gute Organisations- und Projektmanagementfähigkeiten – Fähigkeit, mehrere Prioritäten zu verwalten ein schnelllebiges Umfeld – ausgeprägte Kommunikations- und Stakeholder-Managementfähigkeiten – fließend Englisch; zusätzliche Sprachen sind ein Plus ## Vorteile – Balance zwischen Arbeit und Privatleben: Intelligentes Arbeiten (hybrides Arbeitsmodell) und Zeitflexibilität – Ein internationales, frisches und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld – Programme für körperliche und geistige Gesundheit, nachhaltige Projekte und Workshops, gefördert von Guess Community – Kunst, Sport und gesellschaftliche Veranstaltungen außerhalb des Büros, dank unserer Guess Fun-Aktivitäten! - Schulungs- und Entwicklungsplattform und -pfade - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte sowohl online als auch in Geschäften
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Le responsable des comptes clés et du marché (Amazon et Amérique du Nord) stimule la croissance rentable de la marque sur Amazon en tant que fournisseur (1P) et vendeur du marché (3P), tout en façonnant la stratégie du marché en Amérique du Nord. Ce rôle gère les performances commerciales, prend en charge Amazon P&L et garantit l'excellence opérationnelle, la cohérence de la marque et une croissance soutenue grâce à la coordination avec Amazon, Marketplace NA, les partenaires et les équipes internes. Gestion du P&L et de l'entreprise Gestion des opérations des fournisseurs et vendeurs Amazon Gestion du merchandising et du marketing Reporting et analyses Responsabilités supplémentaires Effectuer des tâches et des projets supplémentaires assignés en fonction des besoins de l'entreprise. ##
• Exigences - Expérience pertinente de plus de 7/8 ans dans le domaine - Expérience antérieure dans des rôles de commerce électronique avec une implication directe dans la gestion du marché Amazon (Vendor Central et/ou Seller Central) - Forte compréhension des opérations, du merchandising et des moteurs de performance d'Amazon - Solides compétences analytiques avec capacité à interpréter les données et les KPI - Expertise de travail avec Excel pour l'analyse des données - Fort esprit commercial avec des compétences en négociation et en gestion des parties prenantes - Expérience de travail avec des agences externes et des équipes interfonctionnelles - Bonnes compétences organisationnelles et de gestion de projet - Capacité à gérer plusieurs priorités dans un environnement en évolution rapide - Solides compétences en communication et en gestion des parties prenantes - Anglais courant ; des langues supplémentaires sont un plus ## Avantages - Équilibre entre travail et vie personnelle : Travail intelligent (modèle de travail hybride) et flexibilité horaire - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamique - Programmes de santé physique et mentale, projets et ateliers durables promus par Guess Community - Arts, sports et événements sociaux en dehors du bureau, grâce à nos activités Guess Fun ! - Plateforme et parcours de formation et de développement - Remise sur nos produits en ligne et en magasin

jobs.title: Sales Associate - Basel Freie Strasse - Hourly Contract
jobs.description:
Für unseren Store in Basel suchen wir Sales Assistants / Verkäufer:innen (w/m/d) im Stundenlohn.

WAS DICH ERWARTET

Gemeinsam mit deinem Team ermöglichst du GUESS Kundinnen und Kunden ein einmaliges Shopping-Erlebnis.

Was wir dir dafür bieten?

DEINE AUFGABEN BEI UNS

Du bist Teil des Store Teams und verantwortest deinen eigenen Aufgabenbereich. Dazu gehören:

## Requirements
- Kunden- und serviceorientiertes Verkaufstalent
- Leidenschaft für Fashion und Trends
- Starke Teamorientierung
- Sehr gute Kommunikations- und Organisationsfähigkeit

titleByLocale.it: Assistente di Vendita - Basel Freie Strasse - Contratto a Ore
titleByLocale.en: Sales Associate - Basel Freie Strasse - Hourly Contract
titleByLocale.fr: Conseiller de Vente - Basel Freie Strasse - Contrat Horaire

descriptionByLocale.it:
Per il nostro negozio a Basilea stiamo cercando Assistenti di vendita / Venditore:innen (w/m/d) nel salario orario. Cosa? Insieme al tuo team, puoi rendere ai clienti GUESS un'esperienza di shopping unica. Cosa ti offriamo? DISCLOSIONE Sei parte del team del negozio e responsabile per il tuo compito. Questo include:
• Requisiti - talento di vendita orientato al cliente e al servizio - Passione per la moda e le tendenze - Forte orientamento del team - Ottima comunicazione e capacità organizzativa
descriptionByLocale.en:
For our store in Basel we are looking for Sales Assistants / Seller:innen (w/m/d) in the hourly wage. WHAT WHAT? Together with your team, you can make GUESS customers a unique shopping experience. What do we offer you? DISCLOSURE You are part of the store team and responsible for your own task. This includes:
• Requirements - Customer and service-oriented sales talent - Passion for fashion and trends - Strong team orientation - Very good communication and organizational capability

jobs.title: Sales Associate - Genève
jobs.description:
Pour l’ouverture de notre nouveau store à Genève, nous recherchons des Sales Associates (h/f/d).

CE QUI T'ATTEND

En collaboration avec ton équipe, tu offres aux clientes et clients GUESS une expérience shopping unique. Et qu’est-ce qu’on t’offre en retour ?

TES MISSIONS

Tu fais partie intégrante de l’équipe boutique et tu prends en charge tes propres responsabilités, notamment:

## Requirements
- Ton sens du service client et ton talent commercial
- Ta passion pour la mode et les tendances
- Ton esprit d’équipe fort
- Ton excellente capacité de communication et d’organisation

descriptionByLocale.it:
Per l'apertura del nostro nuovo negozio a Ginevra, stiamo cercando Sales Associates (h/f/d). Che cosa ti sta ascoltando In collaborazione con il tuo team, offriamo ai clienti GUESS un'esperienza di shopping unica. E cosa offriamo in cambio? MISSIONI Voi siete parte integrante del team del negozio e assumete le vostre responsabilità, tra cui:
• Requisiti - Il tuo senso del servizio clienti e il tuo talento commerciale - La tua passione per la moda e le tendenze - Il tuo forte spirito di squadra - La vostra eccellente comunicazione e capacità organizzativa
descriptionByLocale.en:
For the opening of our new store in Geneva, we are looking for Sales Associates (h/f/d). WHAT IS HEARING YOU In collaboration with your team, you offer GUESS customers a unique shopping experience. And what do we offer in return? MISSIONS You are an integral part of the shop team and you take over your own responsibilities, including:
• Requirements - Your sense of customer service and your commercial talent - Your passion for fashion and trends - Your strong team spirit - Your excellent communication and organizational capacity
descriptionByLocale.de:
Für die Eröffnung unseres neuen Shops in Genf suchen wir Vertriebspartner (h/f/d). WAS IHRE In Zusammenarbeit mit Ihrem Team bieten Sie GUESS-Kunden ein einzigartiges Shopping-Erlebnis. Und was bieten wir im Gegenzug an? MISSIONEN Sie sind integraler Bestandteil des Shop-Teams und übernehmen Ihre eigenen
• Aufgaben, darunter:
• Anforderungen - Ihr Sinn für Kundenservice und Ihr kommerzielles Talent - Ihre Leidenschaft für Mode und Trends - Ihr starker Teamgeist - Ihre ausgezeichnete Kommunikation und Organisationsfähigkeit
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Pour l’ouverture de notre nouveau store à Genève, nous recherchons des Sales Associates (h/f/d). CE QUI T'ATTEND En collaboration avec ton équipe, tu offres aux clientes et clients GUESS une expérience shopping unique. Et qu’est-ce qu’on t’offre en retour ? TES MISSIONS Tu fais partie intégrante de l’équipe boutique et tu prends en charge tes propres responsabilités, notamment: ##
• Requirements - Ton sens du service client et ton talent commercial - Ta passion pour la mode et les tendances - Ton esprit d’équipe fort - Ton excellente capacité de communication et d’organisation
